offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inconsistent cash position reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate daily cash position reports instead of manual cash position reports.
problem: Inconsistent cash position reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting advice
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community groups for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try daily cash position report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
